# Makapix Club — robots.txt
# Canonical site: https://makapix.club
# (The development mirror is served behind HTTP basic-auth + X-Robots-Tag:
#  noindex, so search engines never reach this file there.)

User-agent: *
Allow: /
# The sitemap is generated by the API and lives under /api/. Allow it
# explicitly BEFORE the /api/ disallow below (search engines honor the
# longest/most-specific match, so this wins for just this one URL).
Allow: /api/sitemap.xml
# Backend JSON API + auth-only / tool pages: no SEO value, keep crawlers out.
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /auth
Disallow: /forgot-password
Disallow: /reset-password
Disallow: /verify-email
Disallow: /session-transfer
Disallow: /setup
Disallow: /new-account-welcome
Disallow: /notifications
Disallow: /mod-dashboard
Disallow: /owner-dashboard
Disallow: /debug-env
Disallow: /github-app-setup
Disallow: /submit
Disallow: /editor
Disallow: /pixelc
Disallow: /divoom-import

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# OPTIONAL: opt out of AI training crawlers (supports the "no AI scraping"
# positioning in docs/outreach/05). This blocks crawlers that harvest content
# for model TRAINING while leaving normal search indexing (Googlebot, Bingbot)
# and AI *search* referrers untouched. Delete this block to disable.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Disallow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Disallow: /

User-agent: meta-externalagent
Disallow: /

User-agent: Bytespider
Disallow: /

Sitemap: https://makapix.club/api/sitemap.xml
